name: Golds
description: An opulent, warm palette inspired by luxury brands and premium experiences. Rich golds, deep ambers, and warm neutrals convey elegance, trust, and sophistication.
author: System

referenceTokens.--surface-hierarchy: cream tones in light, deep browns in dark
referenceTokens.--intended-usage: Luxury brands, jewelry, finance, premium SaaS dashboards
referenceTokens.--text-approach: Dark brown text on cream, gold accents for CTAs and highlights
